pack.name: Basic Homeowner Maintenance
pack.description: A starter set of recurring maintenance tasks for common household systems.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

tasks.name: Replace HVAC filter
tasks.description: Replace or clean the main HVAC return filter.
tasks.instructions: Turn off the HVAC fan, remove the old filter, confirm airflow direction, install the new filter, then restart the system.

tasks.name: Test smoke and CO alarms
tasks.description: Test smoke and carbon monoxide alarms and replace batteries when needed.
tasks.instructions: Press each alarm test button, confirm audible alerts, replace batteries if the alarm reports low battery, and replace expired alarms.

tasks.name: Flush water heater
tasks.description: Drain sediment from the water heater to improve efficiency and extend service life.
tasks.instructions: Follow the water heater manual. Turn power or gas to the safe service setting, attach a drain hose, flush sediment, refill, and restore operation.
checklist: Confirm tank is full before restoring heat

tasks.name: Clean dryer vent
tasks.description: Remove lint buildup from the dryer vent path.
tasks.instructions: Unplug the dryer, disconnect the vent, remove lint from the duct and exterior vent, reconnect securely, and run a short test cycle.
